title: siqueiranthus cinereus
intro: Siqueiranthus cinereus is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the family of citrus plants. It is native to Australia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts have been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Siqueiranthus cinereus is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
